name: Bolognese Meat Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Drained canned Italian tomatoes, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a heavy 1 1/2-quart saucepan over medium heat.
2. Add onion and garlic; sauté until onion is translucent.
3. Stir in carrot and celery; cook for about 2 minutes.
4. Add veal to the pan; break it up with a fork, stirring constantly.
5. Cook, stirring frequently, until meat is crumbly and no longer pink, about 8-10 minutes.
6. Stir in milk; cook over low heat, stirring frequently, until some liquid has evaporated, about 3 minutes.
7. Add remaining ingredients; bring the sauce to a boil.
8. Reduce heat and simmer, stirring occasionally, for about 30 minutes or until the sauce is thick and creamy.
9. Makes 4 servings, approximately 3/4 cup each.
[WEIGHT WATCHERS NEW INTERNATIONAL COOKBOOK] Posted by Fred Peters.
